Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO GOVERNMENTAL EMPLOYEES
REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.601

Title: Authorizes Kurt Nolan to receive certain credit under sections 384-d and 384-e of the retirement and social security law
Summary: Authorizes Kurt Nolan to receive certain credit under sections 384-d and 384-e of the retirement and social security law for prior employment with the New York state university police.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to authorizing Kurt Nolan to receive certain credit under sections 384-d and 384-e of the retirement and social security law
